caption: In the video, a woman is giving a presentation in front of an audience. She stands to the left of a large projection screen that displays a webpage titled "Me & My Shadow." The webpage features an illustration of a person with a shadow resembling a dinosaur, along with text explaining the concept of tracing one's shadow. The woman appears to be explaining or discussing the content on the screen, holding a pen and some papers in her hands. A man wearing a green cap is seated in the foreground, attentively watching the presentation. The setting seems to be a professional or educational environment, possibly a conference room or lecture hall.
